title: Color Sort Mania
description: Forget about the everyday life and indulge in a simple world where sorting is an art. Put the bubbles in the most strategic flask and enjoy when everything falls into place.
instructions: Click on the flasks you want to move the bubbles on top between them Make sure all bubbles of the same color are in one flask to pass the level Use the power-ups in case you get stuck or dont know how to proceed
